title: Immortal Species
original_title: ธีซิส อมตะพันธุ์สยอง
overview: Nava, a brilliant botany student, searches for the origin of a plant called ¨Chalawan¨, and to do so he organizes a team of friends to travel through the jungle. There, they encounter a huge man-eating crocodile.
